_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Locate and utilize technical specifications and industry standards (e.g. Internet Engineering Task Force (IETF), IEEE, IEC, International Standards Organization (ISO)).
reference_document_element_description: Define enterprise data integration standards, including interface contracts, schema evolution policies, API versioning standards, and event schema governance.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-003 (DA, cosine: 0.544), DQ-T-015 (DQ, cosine: 0.519).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.436). Shared vocabulary: [standards]. DCWF-only terms [engineering, force, iec, ieee, ietf, industry] vs WIDAI-only terms [api, contracts, data, define, enterprise, event] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.847 (P=0.836, R=0.859). R exceeds P by 0.022 — the WIDAI KSA's 18 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 20 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Locate and utilize technical specifications and industry standards (e.g. Interne" and "Define enterprise data integration standards, including interface contracts, sch" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.554 > STS 0.436 (gap +0.118). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [standards] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.1%. Shared tokens: [standards]. DCWF-only: [engineering, force, iec, ieee, ietf, industry]. WIDAI-only: [api, contracts, data, define, enterprise, event].
